titleStmt.title: 236. Table Prepared in the Department of State

div.head: 236. Table Prepared in the Department of StateSource: National Archives, RG 59, Records of the Under Secretary for Management (M), 1980, Box 6, Chron August 25–30, 1980. No classification marking. Source: PER/MGT/OS Quarterly Summary of Employment (Excluded are non-career Chiefs of Mission, FS/GS Unclassified, Consular Agents, Resident Staff, Wage Board, WAE, and Contract).
div.p:
DEPARTMENT OF STATE
WOMEN EMPLOYEES—BY GRADE AND PAY PLANS
ONE-YEAR STUDY

cell.hi: COMBINED FOREIGN SERVICE AND CIVIL SERVICE

row.cell: FSO–6Starting January 1978, Junior Officers were appointed as Career Candidates—FSR. [Footnote is in the original.]
FSO–7Starting January 1978, Junior Officers were appointed as Career Candidates—FSR. [Footnote is in the original.]
FSO–8Starting January 1978, Junior Officers were appointed as Career Candidates—FSR. [Footnote is in the original.]
TOTAL FSR See FSO/Career Candidate Table. [Footnote is in the original.]
FSSO–4See FSO/Career Candidate Table. [Footnote is in the original.]
